scripts.test: bun test packages/core/test packages/client/test packages/schema/test packages/env/test packages/cron/test packages/otel/test packages/middleware/test packages/auth/test packages/better-auth/test packages/i18n/test packages/image/test packages/uploads/test packages/node/test packages/workers/test packages/content/test packages/runner/test packages/web/test packages/web-solid/test packages/web-react/test packages/web-vue/test packages/web-preact/test packages/web-vanilla/test packages/islets/test packages/web-svelte/test packages/create-nifra/test packages/cli/test
scripts.test:deno: cd packages/deno && deno check src/index.ts && deno test --allow-net --no-check test
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/web/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/web-solid/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/web-react/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/web-vue/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/web-preact/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/web-svelte/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/web-vanilla/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/islets/tsconfig.json
scripts.build: bun run --filter '@nifrajs/core' build && bun run --filter '@nifrajs/mcp' --filter '@nifrajs/client' --filter '@nifrajs/cache' --filter '@nifrajs/testing' --filter '@nifrajs/schema' --filter '@nifrajs/middleware' --filter '@nifrajs/auth' --filter '@nifrajs/better-auth' --filter '@nifrajs/i18n' --filter '@nifrajs/image' --filter '@nifrajs/uploads' --filter '@nifrajs/storage' --filter '@nifrajs/node' --filter '@nifrajs/runner' --filter '@nifrajs/env' --filter '@nifrajs/cron' --filter '@nifrajs/jobs' --filter '@nifrajs/otel' --filter '@nifrajs/web' --filter '@nifrajs/cli' --filter 'create-nifra' --filter 'nifra' build && bun run --filter '@nifrajs/web-solid' --filter '@nifrajs/web-react' --filter '@nifrajs/web-vue' --filter '@nifrajs/web-preact' --filter '@nifrajs/web-svelte' --filter '@nifrajs/web-vanilla' --filter '@nifrajs/islets' build
scripts.gen:llms: bun run scripts/gen-llms.ts && bun run gen:cards
scripts.site:build: bun run build && bun run gen:llms && bun run gen:api && bun run site/build.ts
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run check:docs && bun run check:api && bun run check:cards
scripts.changeset:publish: bun run build && bun run gen:llms && bun run scripts/resolve-workspace-deps.ts && changeset publish && bun run scripts/point-latest.ts
